objective: Run bounded native-checkpoint generation/NLL quality for the measured score24/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax profile after the reduced-replica Llama7B recost improved on score32/w16.

decoder_contract.attention_mixed_int8_score24_w16_rtl_exa: Run a bounded native-checkpoint generation/NLL gate for the measured score24/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax profile. This removes the quality-linkage inference from qkv8_float_exact before treating the score24/w16 PPA recost as a frontier point.

evaluation_record.title: Llama7B score24/w16 RTL exact-divide generation quality
evaluation_record.primary_question: Does the measured score24/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax profile preserve bounded greedy generation and teacher-forced reference-token likelihood on a 7B checkpoint?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: If score24/w16 RTL exact-divide passes, use the measured lower-area score24/w16 recost as the active quality-backed frontier. If it fails, keep the recost as physical evidence but plan recovery through higher precision, a different softmax model, or QAT.
